calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2016 Vacated

Defendants Lawrence Lew And Jose Nava'S Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoena Issued By Plaintiffs To The Custodian Of Records For Craigslist
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants Lawrence Lew And Jose Nava's Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoena Issued By Plaintiffs To The Custodian Of Records For Craigslist is taken off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on November 16, 2015. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoena Issued By Plaintiffs To The Custodian Of Records For Craigslist
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS LAWRENCE LEW and JOSE NAVA's Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoena Issued By Plaintiffs To The Custodian Of Records For Craigslist is transferred to department 301 to be heard on November 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Continued To Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
